MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-500217 WITH CASE CGC-09-494798
Off Calendar Sep-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Craig S. Dykman of Dykman & Wester (454.8545) for plaintiff and moving party; Frederick P. Sheinfield of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3872) for the City and County of San Francisco; Matthew J. Orebic of the Office of the City Attorney (510.981.6998) for the city of Berkeley

Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CHRISTINE PETERSON'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-500217 WITH CASE CGC-09-494798 is granted. Plaintiff sustained similar injuries, fractures to her right wrist, in two slip and fall accidents three months apart. Treatment for her injuries was complicated by the new fracture being superimposed on the prior fracture, complicating the apportionment of her injuries between the two actions. All parties would be prejudiced unless the cases are consolidated. Cases are consolidated for all purposes with CGC-09-494798 as the lead case. Further, the court granted Mr. Orebic's request for a stay (including discovery). Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR #4838
